name: WP AI Scheduler Dev
postCreateCommand: composer install && mkdir -p .vscode && echo '{"mcpServers": {"wp-ai-scheduler-tools": {"command": "php","args": ["/var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/ai-post-scheduler/mcp-bridge.php"]}}}' > .vscode/cline_mcp_settings.json && (wp core is-installed --allow-root || echo 'Waiting for WP installation...')
postStartCommand: until wp core is-installed --allow-root >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; echo 'Waiting for DB...'; done && wp eval-file scripts/setup-devstacktips-content.php --allow-root
